experience.title: Electrical Power Engineering
experience.description: I studied Electrical Engineering for three years, where I developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills. This technical foundation has enhanced my ability to approach challenges in web development with a systematic mindset.

experience.title: B.Sc (Hons) Computing
experience.description: I completed the Bacher degree in Computing, where I gained knowledge and developed Android applications, Movie Ticket Booking System, and a web-based group project. This program equipped me with the skills to coorporate with team members, enhancing my ability to deliver robust web applications.

experience.title: Junior React Developer
experience.description: I worked as a Junior React Developer, building scalable and responsive web applications using React and Next.js. Collaborated with backend teams to integrate APIs and improve application performance. Gained hands-on experience in state management, modern frontend architectures, and delivering user-friendly interfaces in a professional development environment.
